productDisplayName: Maxima Men Silver Dial Scuba Watch
description: Style Note Want to steal the show? Want to break off from the mundane? Want to set a trend? Want to stand out from the crowd? Now here's your chance to make a slick style statement with this Scuba watch from maxima - this is the time-piece you've been waiting for to pep-up your accessory collection! Product Details Case style: Round stainless steel case Dial style: Silver dial with silver indicies and silver and white hands Features: Date aperture at 12 hour mark Strap stype: Genuine leather strap with red top stitching and tang clasp Water resistant to 3ATM, suitable for light rain or splashes Warranty: 1 Year Size: Case diameter: 35 mm Case thickness: 8 mm
